title: Update CTA button hyperlinks to demo URL

requirements.summary: Update the 'Request the demo' button in the CallToAction component to link to the demo URL
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Request the demo' button navigates to the specified URL when clicked
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes

file_operations.description: Update the 'Request the demo' button to use an anchor tag linking to https://ai.studio/apps/29036910-44c0-41d1-86a5-c8a35a69379f with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security

requirements.summary: Update the 'Get started' button in the Hero component to link to the demo URL
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Get started' button navigates to the specified URL when clicked
The link opens in a new tab with appropriate security attributes

file_operations.description: Update the 'Get started' button to use an anchor tag linking to https://ai.studio/apps/29036910-44c0-41d1-86a5-c8a35a69379f with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security
